Name: Jasper DRG Events
Description: Dragoon public event profile for general PvE. It maintains Feint, Second Wind, Bloodbath, Leg Sweep, Arm's Length, jump helpers, DoT support, and normal pack AoE release while leaving ForceAOE manual. Lineage note: Arche supplied the general reaction groundwork and coverage; Jasper reshapes it here for public-duty safety, job controls, and xSalice compatibility.

Events.Name: Bloodbath Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Bloodbath near 70 percent HP to smooth melee self-recovery.

Events.Name: Second Wind Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Second Wind once personal HP falls near 60 percent.

Events.Name: Leg Sweep Interrupt
Events.Description: Stuns interruptible enemy casts when Leg Sweep is in melee range.

Events.Name: Arm's Length Self-Guard
Events.Description: Triggers Arm's Length only when you are stationary, pressured, and several mobs are on you.

Events.Name: Out-of-Combat Reset
Events.Description: Returns Dragoon ACR toggles to their standard out-of-combat state.

Events.Name: Zone Reset
Events.Description: Dragoon defaults are reapplied after changing zones.

Events.Name: Wipe Reset
Events.Description: Dragoon defaults are reapplied after a wipe.

Events.Name: Feint Tankbuster
Events.Description: Applies Feint to tankbusters when the target is not already covered.

Events.Name: Damage State Guard
Events.Description: Maintains Dragoon burst, AoE, jump safety, DOT, ranged, and gauge/spender helper toggles in combat so imported or held toggle states cannot strand the job in a passive state.

Events.Name: Pack Damage Release
Events.Description: Maintains standard Dragoon AoE, jump, burst, and spender helper toggles on 2+ enemy pulls while leaving ForceAOE manual.

Conditions.Name: Second Wind <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for Bloodbath use.

Conditions.Name: Leg Sweep Cast in Range
Conditions.Description: Target is casting within Leg Sweep range.

Logics.Name: Bloodbath
Logics.Description: Uses Bloodbath near 70 percent HP to smooth melee self-recovery.

Logics.Name: Second Wind
Logics.Description: Uses Second Wind once personal HP falls near 60 percent.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Returns Dragoon ACR settings to their normal out-of-combat state, including AoE, jump safety, DOT, ranged, and positional helper toggles. ForceAOE remains manual.

Logics.Name: Feint TB
Logics.Description: Applies Feint to tankbusters when the target is not already covered.

Logics.Name: Leg Sweep Stun
Logics.Description: Stuns interruptible enemy casts when Leg Sweep is in melee range.

Logics.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Arm's Length as self-defense when stationary below 70 percent HP with two or more mobs on you.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Maintains Dragoon burst, AoE, jump safety, DOT, ranged, and gauge/spender helper toggles in combat so imported or held toggle states cannot strand the job in a passive state.

Logics.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Logics.Description: Maintains standard Dragoon AoE, jump, burst, and spender helper toggles on 2+ enemy pulls while leaving ForceAOE manual.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Litany, Lance Charge, and Life Surge near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves burst near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Feint
Items.Description: Applies Feint during raidwide and tankbuster mitigation windows.

Items.Name: Self Guard
Items.Description: Uses personal recovery tools through Bloodbath, Second Wind, and Arm's Length.

Items.Name: Stun
Items.Description: Stuns cast targets that are inside Leg Sweep range.
